summary: Tested Kaelra Entity Home redesign, Browser Alerts (Web Push), Jobs Search with sample fallback, and clean-slate gating. Backend APIs 99.2% passing. Frontend demo user flows working correctly. New user signup flow has UI issue preventing completion.

minor_issues.issue: 1 test failed out of 126 (99.2% success rate)

ui_bugs.issue: New user signup form shows 'Hetul' pre-filled in name field and doesn't submit successfully
ui_bugs.details: Form stays on /auth page after clicking 'Create account' button. Name field appears to be pre-filled with demo user data.

passed_tests: Backend: Web Push APIs (vapid-public-key, subscribe, unsubscribe, test) - 100%
Backend: Jobs search with sample fallback - 100%
Backend: Clean-slate gating (demo has data, fresh user empty) - 100%
Frontend: Entity Home - kaelra-greeting with warm briefing
Frontend: Entity Home - home-ambient-status and phrase present
Frontend: Entity Home - Conversation composer (textarea, send, listen buttons)
Frontend: Entity Home - Intent chips present and clickable
Frontend: Entity Home - kaelra-mute-toggle works (no crash)
Frontend: Entity Home - Priority feed with items and tabs
Frontend: Entity Home - Feed items clickable (KaelraSpeaks dialog)
Frontend: Entity Home - Learned stream with 8 items (demo)
Frontend: Jobs - jobs-search-panel with keywords input
Frontend: Jobs - jobs-search-sample-banner present (no API key)
Frontend: Jobs - 5 sample job results displayed
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix new user signup flow: The signup form pre-fills 'Hetul' in the name field and doesn't submit successfully. After clicking 'Create account', the page stays on /auth instead of creating the user and navigating to home. This blocks testing of clean-slate empty state for new users. Backend clean-slate gating is verified working via API tests (fresh user gets empty feed, skills, jobs). All other features (Entity Home, Browser Alerts, Jobs Search) are working correctly for demo user.
